clusterConfiguration._comment_fixedSize: Fixed-size cluster: maxWorkerNodes=1 emits autoscale(1,1) -> exactly one worker, no scaling, while still satisfying the policy's SHOULD_USE_AUTOSCALING_INFO requirement. Dev uses one small E8ds_v5 = 8 vCPU / 64 GB RAM with local NVMe SSD, so the Delta (disk) cache is enabled. initialPartitionNum = cores x 4 = 32.

deploymentConfig._comment_clusterConfigurations: Per-catalog overrides on top of clusterConfiguration. Each field optional; absent fields inherit the global value. sparkConf is shallow-merged (per-catalog wins).

sr._comment: Dev SR on the single E8ds_v5 worker (fixed size, Delta cache enabled). materializeSource=none keeps small MERGEs cheap.

dm_md._comment: Dev DM on the single E8ds_v5 worker (fixed size, Delta cache enabled).

dw_tx._comment: Dev DW_TX on the single E8ds_v5 worker (fixed size, Delta cache enabled). Tune once the layer has tables.
